method_note: Engels S/M ported to a TopK dictionary: global top-32 selection precedes the cluster restriction (a cluster feature outside a sample's global top-32 is absent), and ranking uses the BEST PC pair (the paper aggregates over plane pairs; per-pair values + the mean are stored in pair_scores). The paper's calibration values are references, not matched thresholds.

instrument_flagging.multiple_testing: per-feature min p Bonferroni across 11 labels; BH q<=0.05 across active features

ablation.ablation_note: information-removal test: subtracting SAE terms and REFITTING the probe asks whether PA stays decodable, not whether a fixed readout causally depends on those features; controls are activation-energy decile-matched
